title: The Lost Wallet
content: Michael was buying lunch when he noticed something strange. His wallet was missing. He checked his pockets again and again, but it was not there. He felt nervous because his cards and ID were inside. Michael walked back through the street slowly, looking at the ground. Near the bus stop, an older woman smiled at him and held up a black wallet. She found it on a bench nearby. Michael thanked her many times. After that moment, he decided to be more careful with his belongings.
